shell_description: Navigate between the three primary areas without crowding the interface.
shell_footer_note: Account switching and reminders will live under Settings.
landing_title: Track zakat with a calm, native-feeling app
landing_description: The public landing page stays separate from the app. Continue with Google, create an account, or open the app area when you are ready.
landing_surface: This page is now the public landing page. The app shell and all app-specific routes live under /app.
home_title: Start with the latest wealth snapshot
home_description: This first shell slice gives the app a stable place to land before auth and data flows are connected.
home_next_up_body: We will wire the sign-in flow and keep these primary tabs protected for authenticated users.
history_description: Review each zakat cycle, payment state, reminder activity, and source snapshot for the active profile.
history_surface: Cycle history keeps payment updates separate from the frozen snapshot history.
history_mark_cycle_paid_no_active_profil: Select an active profile before marking a cycle as paid.
history_mark_cycle_paid_not_found: The selected cycle could not be found.
history_no_active_profile_description: Choose the profile you want to review in Settings before opening history.
history_empty_description: Once a wealth snapshot creates a cycle, it will appear here with its payment state and reminder activity.
history_cycle_reminders_empty: No reminder activity has been recorded for this cycle yet.
settings_title: Keep account setup in one place
settings_description: Profile creation, switching, delegated access, and reminder preferences will live here.
settings_surface: Account actions and preferences will use the same reusable patterns as other screens.
settings_notifications_description: Grant browser permission and manage the devices attached to the active profile.
settings_notifications_no_active_profile: Select a profile you own before managing push notifications.
settings_notifications_connection_descri: Connect this browser to receive push reminders for the active profile.
settings_notifications_not_supported_des: This browser cannot receive push notifications.
settings_notifications_permission_denied: Push notifications are blocked for this browser. Allow them in browser settings to continue.
settings_notifications_permission_grante: This browser is allowed to receive reminders.
settings_notifications_permission_reques: Grant permission when you are ready to receive reminders.
settings_notifications_not_configured: Push delivery is not configured yet.
settings_notifications_not_supported_err: This browser does not support push notifications.
settings_notifications_subscription_payl: Unable to build the push subscription payload.
settings_notifications_empty_description: Connect this device to start receiving reminders for the active profile.
settings_notifications_subscriptions_des: These browsers can receive reminders for the active profile.
settings_notifications_unsubscribe_confi: This device will stop receiving push reminders for the active profile.
settings_active_profile_description: Pick the profile that is active in the main settings screen.
settings_active_profile_load_error: Unable to load the active profile list.
settings_active_profile_empty_descriptio: Create your first profile on the profiles page to start tracking zakat.
settings_active_profile_no_results_descr: Try a different search term or clear the search to see all profiles.
profiles_description: Create, rename, delete, and manage delegated access for each profile.
profiles_surface: Profile management now lives on a dedicated screen.
profiles_create_description: Add a zakat tracking profile and choose its fiqh preferences.
profiles_edit_description: Rename the selected profile, update its fiqh preferences, or delete it if you own it.
profiles_edit_not_found_description: The selected profile is no longer available.
profiles_selector_description: Select the profile you want to edit.
profiles_selector_empty_description: Create a profile first, then select it here.
profiles_details_description: Rename the selected profile or delete it if you own it.
profiles_details_delete_description: Delete this profile and its linked access records.
reminders_title: Feature scaffold for reminder scheduling and delivery
reminders_description: Reminder setup will reuse the same shared patterns for cards, spacing, and state feedback.
auth_description: Use Google to sign in or create your account in one step.
auth_sign_in_description: Use your Google account to access your saved zakat data.
auth_sign_up_description: Use Google to create your account and sign in automatically.
auth_google_description: Use your Google account to access your saved zakat data.
auth_email_description: We’ll use this address to create and access your account.
auth_sign_in_password_description: Enter the password for your account.
auth_confirm_password_description: Re-enter the password to confirm it.
profile_access_sign_in_required: You must be signed in to manage profiles.
profile_access_not_found: The requested profile does not exist.
profile_access_forbidden: You do not have access to this profile.
profile_access_owner_only: Only the profile owner can manage access.
profile_access_user_not_found: No user exists for that email address.
profile_access_owner_already_has_access: The profile owner already has access.
reminder_zakat_cycle_not_found: The requested zakat cycle does not exist.
notification_sign_in_required: Please sign in to manage push notifications.
notification_no_active_profile: Select an active profile to manage push notifications.
notification_subscription_not_found: The requested push subscription could not be found.
notification_delivery_not_configured: Push delivery is not configured yet.
notification_delivery_failed: The push notification could not be delivered.
notification_delivery_failed_with_status: The push notification could not be delivered (HTTP {statusCode}).
notification_balance_update_body: Open your wealth snapshot to keep your records up to date.
notification_zakat_due_before_due_body: Your current cycle is approaching its due date.
notification_zakat_due_due_body: Your current cycle is due today.
notification_zakat_due_follow_up_body: Your current cycle is still marked unpaid.
wealth_description: Review the latest zakatable position and browse saved history for the active profile.
wealth_surface: Use the form below to record the current profile position.
wealth_empty_description: Enter the current amounts below to save the first frozen snapshot for this profile.
wealth_snapshot_create_description: Record a fresh snapshot for the active profile.
wealth_snapshot_edit_description: Capture a new revision of the active snapshot without changing history.
wealth_snapshot_edit_load_error: Unable to load the current snapshot.
wealth_snapshot_edit_not_found_descripti: Create the first snapshot before you can refresh it.
wealth_snapshot_current_description: Latest saved snapshot for the active profile.
wealth_snapshot_current_fiqh_description: Frozen from the active profile at capture time.
wealth_snapshot_current_date_rule_reset_: Sub-nisab dips reset the current hawl immediately for this madhab.
wealth_snapshot_current_date_rule_preser: Sub-nisab dips preserve the current hawl, but the anniversary can still reset it if nisab is still unmet.
wealth_snapshot_current_date_rule_unavai: The date rule is unavailable for this snapshot.
wealth_snapshot_current_load_error: Unable to load the current snapshot.
wealth_snapshot_current_empty_descriptio: Create the first snapshot to see the current status here.
wealth_snapshot_benchmark_unavailable: No cached benchmark pricing is available yet.
wealth_snapshot_benchmark_capture_note: Capture will use the current cached benchmark.
wealth_snapshot_benchmark_stale_note: This cached benchmark is older than 24 hours, but capture will still use it.
wealth_snapshot_refresh_warning: Saving creates a new revision instead of changing the existing snapshot.
wealth_snapshot_explanation_description: The reasoning below is frozen with this snapshot revision.
wealth_snapshot_explanation_not_availabl: Explanation details are unavailable for this snapshot.
wealth_snapshot_history_description: Saved snapshots appear here in reverse chronological order.
wealth_snapshot_no_active_profile: Select an active profile before saving a snapshot.
settings_app_experience_description: Language stays here. Navigation stays in the shell. Other preferences can join this page later without crowding the main screens.
settings_profiles_description: Switch between profiles, create a new one, and manage delegated access here.
settings_profiles_current_description: This is the profile the screen is focused on right now.
settings_profiles_current_owner_descript: You own this profile and can manage access.
settings_profiles_current_manager_descri: You can edit this profile, but only the owner can manage access.
settings_profiles_switch_description: Choose which profile to work with on this screen.
settings_profiles_empty_description: Create your first profile to start tracking zakat.
settings_profile_create_description: Add a zakat tracking profile for a person or household.
settings_profile_create_name_description: Use a short name you will recognize later.
settings_profile_create_madhab_descripti: This profile's zakat rules will follow the selected school.
settings_profile_create_nisab_benchmark_: Choose the benchmark used to determine nisab.
settings_profile_create_hawl_started_at_: Optional. Set the date your current hawl started so the app can continue from the right reference point.
settings_active_profile_fiqh_description: Read the madhab and nisab benchmark for the active profile.
settings_active_profile_fiqh_load_error: Unable to load the active profile fiqh preferences.
settings_active_profile_fiqh_empty_descr: Choose an active profile to see its fiqh preferences here.
settings_reminders_description: Set the cadence, timezone, quiet hours, and follow-up behavior for this profile.
settings_reminders_summary_description: These values are read only here. Open the edit page if you need to change them.
settings_reminders_no_active_profile_des: Select a profile first to configure its reminder preferences.
settings_reminders_balance_cadence_descr: Choose how often the app should prompt for a fresh wealth snapshot.
settings_reminders_timezone_description: Use an IANA timezone such as Europe/Brussels.
settings_reminders_quiet_hours_descripti: Reminders inside this local window wait until quiet hours end.
settings_reminders_follow_up_description: Keep sending zakat due reminders until the current cycle is marked paid.
settings_reminders_validation_invalid_qu: Quiet hours must not start and end at the same time.
settings_profile_access_description: Grant or revoke access for the selected profile.
settings_profile_access_owner_only: Only profile owners can manage delegated access.
settings_profile_access_owner_only_descr: Select a profile you own to invite or remove other editors.
settings_profile_access_email_descriptio: Use the email address linked to the account you want to invite.
settings_profile_access_revoke_descripti: These users can edit the selected profile.
settings_profile_access_revoke_empty_des: Grant access to a teammate or family member when needed.
settings_profile_access_revoke_confirm_d: This user will lose access to the selected profile.
settings_account_description: Sign out from this device when you are done.
settings_sign_out_confirm_description: You will need to sign in again to access your app data on this device.
profiles_empty_description: Create your first profile to start tracking zakat for a person or household.
reminders_empty_description: Reminder schedules will appear here once you set them up.
wealth_empty_description: Create your first snapshot to begin tracking zakatable assets and liabilities.
not_found_description: The requested page could not be found.
